with open\('/home/malston/language-study/vocabulary/Japanese/japanese_vocabulary.txt', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('/home/malston/language-study/vocabulary/Japanese/japanese_vocabulary.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Fix the appended lines
content = content.replace\('11→ありがとう！ / Arigatou\\!|Thank you\\!|', 'ありがとう！ / Arigatou!|Thank you!|'\)
content = content.replace\('12→いいえ。', 'いいえ。'\)
content = content.replace\('13→どうぞ。', 'どうぞ。'\)
content = content.replace\('14→すみません。', 'すみません。'\)

with open\('/home/malston/language-study/vocabulary/Japanese/japanese_vocabulary.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
with open\('/home/malston/language-study/vocabulary/Japanese/japanese_vocabulary.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

new_lines = []
for line in lines:
    line = line.replace\('11→', ''\).replace\('12→', ''\).replace\('13→', ''\).replace\('14→', ''\)
    line = line.replace\(r'\\!', '!'\)
    new_lines.append\(line\)

with open\('/home/malston/language-study/vocabulary/Japanese/japanese_vocabulary.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(new_lines\)
EOF)
